resume.hi-IN: Aapka call pehle kat gaya tha. Wahin se shuru karein?
resume.ta-IN: Ungal azhappu munbu thunindhuviddu. Angirundhu thodarvomaa?
resume.bn-IN: Apnar call age kete gechilo. Oikhane theke shuru korbo?
resume.te-IN: Mee call mundu cut ayyindi. Akkada nundi modalupeddaamaa?
resume.gu-IN: Tamaaro call pehla cut thai gayo hato. Tyaathi sharu kariye?
resume.kn-IN: Nimma call modale cut aayitu. Allinda shuru maadona?
resume.ml-IN: Ningalude call munpil cut aayi. Avidunnu thudangaamoo?
resume.mr-IN: Tumcha call aadhi cut jhala hota. Tithe-pasun suru karuyat kaa?
resume.pa-IN: Tuhaada call pehlan cut ho gaya si. Othe toh shuru kariye?
resume.od-IN: Apananka call aage cut heithila. Seithi ru aarambha karibu ki?
resume.en-IN: Your previous call was disconnected. Shall we continue from where we left off?

default_welcome.hi-IN: Namaste! Main Vaidya hoon. Aapko kya jaanna hai?
default_welcome.ta-IN: Vanakkam! Naan Vaidya. Ungalukku enna theriya vendum?
default_welcome.bn-IN: Namaskar! Ami Vaidya. Apnar ki jante hobe?
default_welcome.te-IN: Namaskaram! Nenu Vaidya. Meeku emi telusukovalanukuntunnaru?
default_welcome.gu-IN: Namaste! Hu Vaidya chhu. Tamare shu jaanvu chhe?
default_welcome.kn-IN: Namaskara! Naanu Vaidya. Nimge enu tiliyabeku?
default_welcome.ml-IN: Namaskkaram! Njaan Vaidya. Ningalkku entha ariyaanam?
default_welcome.mr-IN: Namaskar! Mi Vaidya. Tumhala kaay jaanun ghyaychay?
default_welcome.pa-IN: Sat Sri Akaal! Mai Vaidya haan. Tuhaanu ki jaanna hai?
default_welcome.od-IN: Namaskar! Mu Vaidya. Apananku ki jaanibaku achhi?
default_welcome.en-IN: Hello! I am Vaidya. How can I help you?

session_expired.hi-IN: Aapka session khatam ho gaya. Kripya dubara call karein.
session_expired.ta-IN: Ungal session mudindhuviddu. Thayavu seythu meendum azhaikavum.
session_expired.bn-IN: Apnar session sesh hoye geche. Abar call korun.
session_expired.te-IN: Mee session mugipoindi. Dayachesi malli call cheyandi.
session_expired.gu-IN: Tamaaru session puru thai gayu. Maherbani kari fari call karo.
session_expired.kn-IN: Nimma session mugidide. Dayavittu matte call maadi.
session_expired.ml-IN: Ningalude session kazhinjhu. Dayavayi viiNdum vilikkuka.
session_expired.mr-IN: Tumcha session sampala. Krupaya punha call karaa.
session_expired.pa-IN: Tuhaada session khatam ho gaya. Kirpaya dubara call karo.
session_expired.od-IN: Apananka session shesa heigala. Dayakari punarvaar call karantu.
session_expired.en-IN: Your session has expired. Please call again.

error.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, thodi dikkat aa rahi hai. Kya aap phir se bata sakte hain?
error.ta-IN: Mannikkavum, sila prachanai. Thayavu seythu meendum sollunga?
error.bn-IN: Dukkhito, ektu somossa hocche. Abar bolben please?
error.te-IN: Kshaminchaandi, kontha samasya vachindi. Malli cheppagalaraa?
error.gu-IN: Maaf karo, thodi taklif aavi. Fari kahesho?
error.kn-IN: Kshamisi, swalpa taandre aayitu. Matte heli?
error.ml-IN: Kshamikku, oru prayaasam vannu. ViiNdum parayoo?
error.mr-IN: Maaf karaa, thodi adchan aali. Punha saangaal kaa?
error.pa-IN: Maafi, thodi dikkat aa gayi. Fir dassoge?
error.od-IN: Kshama karantu, gotie samasya aasila. Punithare kahantu?
error.en-IN: Sorry, something went wrong. Could you say that again?

still_working.hi-IN: Bas thoda aur, main dekh raha hoon.
still_working.pa-IN: Haale dekh reha haan, ik minute.
